## Description

Describe the changes you've made and the rationale behind them. What problem does this PR solve or what feature does it add?

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🚀 Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 💅 Polish (UI/UX clean up, styling improvements)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (optimization for speed or bundle size)
- [ ] 🛡️ Security / Hardening
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's **TypeScript** and **Tailwind CSS 4** standards.
- [ ] I have run `pnpm lint` and fixed any issues.
- [ ] My changes pass the `pnpm build` verification.
- [ ] I have verified that Lighthouse scores remain 95+ (if UI changes were made).
- [ ] I have checked for accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA) and keyboard navigation.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have updated the documentation.

---

## 📸 Visuals (Optional)

If this PR introduces UI changes, please include screenshots or a quick video demonstrating the update.

---

## Related Issues

Closes #[Issue Number]
